aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business as a top recommendation due to limited conversational content and missing schema markups that enhance visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data to address common HVAC queries.
Add LocalBusiness schema markup to improve AI recognition of the business.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and local recommendations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Incorporate FAQ content addressing common HVAC issues and solutions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as a local HVAC expert by publishing detailed guides and tutorials with HowTo schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistant users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ content and schema markups rank higher in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement targeted FAQ content, LocalBusiness schema, and HowTo guides to enhance AI visibility and authority.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; acting now prevents further loss of market share.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Optimize for Conversational Search Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search performance.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven search and increase your leads.
